name: Extreme Bid Wall Absorption
hypothesis: A very strong BBO bid imbalance (obi_1 > 0.9) coinciding with extreme, persistent selling pressure (trade imbalance z-score < -2.5) indicates a high-conviction seller exhaustion point. Tightening both thresholds isolates the most extreme absorption events, which should precede a sharp reversal upwards.
mutation_note: Tightened thresholds on both components (obi_1 from >0.8 to >0.9, zscore from <-2.0 to <-2.5) based on feedback to isolate a higher-conviction subset of trades.
